'''wanozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:draftmanship|draftmanship]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:draftmanship|draftmanship]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wanozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wænezeth|wænezeth]] || [[word:wænezej|wænezej]] || [[word:wænezesh|wænezesh]] || [[word:wæneze|wæneze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wanonozoth|wanonozoth]] || [[word:wanonozoj|wanonozoj]] || [[word:wanonozosh|wanonozosh]] || [[word:wanonozo|wanonozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wanozoth|wanozoth]] || [[word:wanozoj|wanozoj]] || [[word:wanozosh|wanozosh]] || [[word:wanozo|wanozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wanofzoth|wanofzoth]] || [[word:wanofzoj|wanofzoj]] || [[word:wanofzosh|wanofzosh]] || [[word:wanofzof|wanofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wanozotho|wanozotho]] || [[word:wanozojo|wanozojo]] || [[word:wanozosho|wanozosho]] || [[word:wanozoko|wanozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wanozoth|wanozoth]] || [[word:wanozoj|wanozoj]] || [[word:wanozosh|wanozosh]] || [[word:wanozo|wanozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wanozothol|wanozothol]] || [[word:wanozojol|wanozojol]] || [[word:wanozoshol|wanozoshol]] || [[word:wanozokol|wanozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wanozothotho|wanozothotho]] || [[word:wanozojojo|wanozojojo]] || [[word:wanozoshosho|wanozoshosho]] || [[word:wanozoko|wanozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wanozothon|wanozothon]] || [[word:wanozojon|wanozojon]] || [[word:wanozoshon|wanozoshon]] || [[word:wanozokon|wanozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wanozothoro|wanozothoro]] || [[word:wanozojoro|wanozojoro]] || [[word:wanozoshoro|wanozoshoro]] || [[word:wanozokoro|wanozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
